posts.author: Miguel1 (Miguel)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be better if there are way to have a force stoppage if there is a subscriber that is not a good payer. Let us say they bought the workspace template and they are used to that workspace and then they stop using the template but they just duplicate the templates.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sharing your request @Miguel1!
